title: nothoscordum bivalve var. bivalve
intro: Nothoscordum bivalve var. bivalve, also known as the 'grass whitlow-wort', is a plant species in the family Amaryllidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an expectorant to relieve coughs. Nothoscordum bivalve var. bivalve can be prepared into herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
